offer: For freelancer managing 5–15 projects/month, inaccurate hour tracking causes delayed payments. We automate timesheet submission instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Tracking hours accurately for multiple clients
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for freelancers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about time tracking

pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Offer early-access onboarding for initial users

automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
